title: AI Agent fails with specific GPT model
symptom: The AI Agent does not work when using the 'openai/gpt-4o-mini' model, throwing a provider error. Switching to 'openai/gpt-4o' resolves the issue.
root_cause: The error occurs due to compatibility issues between the AI Agent and the specific GPT model 'openai/gpt-4o-mini'. This model may not handle tool interactions properly, leading to provider errors during execution.
fix_steps: Open the AI Agent node settings
agent_instruction: Change the GPT model in the AI Agent node settings to 'openai/gpt-4o'.
